svg.title: The fix for RAG: splitting the PDF into chunks and sending only the matching chunk in the request
svg.desc: The PDF is split into many small chunks. The app picks the one chunk that matches the question and places only that chunk into the request frame. The frame is now small and fits within the model MTU, so the data center returns a normal answer.
svg.text: 1. The fix — split the PDF into chunks
App splits the text into many small chunks
(how the app finds the match — next lesson)
2. Only the matching chunk goes into the frame
just the part that answers the question
3. The small frame fits — the data center answers
